description_long: This object is a whimsical combat tactical vehicle constructed primarily from cardboard, resembling a tank with exaggerated, cartoon-like proportions. The main body is boxy with angular panels, featuring a large cylindrical cannon protruding from the front. A circular hatch is open on the top, revealing a cat figure sitting inside as the 'commander.' The vehicle has simple, stylized treads and wheels visible along the lower sides, and a few playful stickers and markings are attached to the exterior. The phrase 'PEACE WAS NEVER AN OPTION' is displayed in bold, curved text in front of the vehicle, adding a humorous touch. The overall appearance is light-hearted and playful, with a tan color scheme and minimal surface detailing.
description: A tan, cardboard tank with a cat commander, large cannon, and playful stickers, featuring the phrase 'PEACE WAS NEVER AN OPTION' in front.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the cat in the open hatch, the large cannon, and the curved 'PEACE WAS NEVER AN OPTION' text.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the cannon's barrel, the cat in the hatch, and the full frontal display of the text.
description_view_2: Right-side view showing the tank's treads, side panels, and the cat in the hatch, with the text partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the tank, the open hatch, and the absence of the text in the immediate foreground.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted at the front of the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Cardboard panels cover the full body, with no visible reinforcement or sloping; thickness appears minimal.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the vehicle is a solid tan color with some stickers.
attribute_military_markings: Playful stickers and the phrase 'PEACE WAS NEVER AN OPTION' in black text in front; no formal military insignia.
attribute_tire_type: Not applicable; the vehicle uses stylized treads with visible wheels.
